title: Cinematic Buildings
description: Create cinematic building shots with ease!
body:
# Cinematic Buildings - Create cinematic building shots with ease!

Cinematic Buildings is a mod for Minecraft that allows players to create cinematic building shots with ease.

This mod is designed to enhance the visual experience of servers/modpacks, by allowing users to trigger building animations that showcase the construction of structures in a cinematic way or tearing down of structures.

**Perfect for server owners, or modpack creators!**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/INJ0Kx4FVl4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Features

Cinematic Buildings offers the following features:
- Create building animations via commands (`/cb`) 
  - Can be executed via command to run with set initial delay and layer delay


## Wiki

Check out the [wiki](https://github.com/magnushjensen/cinematic-buildings/wiki) for detailed documentation.

If you think anything is missing from the wiki that is unclear, send a message in the discord or open an [improve documentation issue](https://github.com/MagnusHJensen/cinematic-buildings/issues/new?template=3.Improve_docs.md).

## Roadmap

Check out the version [milestones](https://github.com/MagnusHJensen/cinematic-buildings/milestones)
